appraisal.description: A cracked dressing-room hand mirror whose second face stays behind the glass when covered.

clues.result: The central crack splits the reflected face, but the second face stays behind the glass.
UV light shows no maker's mark, only a second eye caught under the lifted backing.
Covering the mirror brings the cold spot back toward room temperature.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If sold or broken loose, a second reflection leaves the glass before its owner does.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Cracked Hand Mirror.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Cracked Hand Mirror.
